description_long: This cabinetry ensemble features a modern, L-shaped configuration with a combination of base cabinets, wall cabinets, and a central island. The cabinetry is finished in a light, neutral color with wood-textured countertops and shelving, creating a clean and contemporary look. The base cabinets include multiple drawers and doors, each fitted with small, round knob handles in a contrasting color. The wall section incorporates both closed storage and open shelving, providing a mix of concealed and display space. The central island offers additional workspace and storage, making it suitable for kitchen or office environments. The overall structure is enclosed by partial walls, suggesting a built-in or semi-enclosed installation.
description: A modern L-shaped cabinetry set with wood-textured countertops, multiple drawers and doors, and a central island, all finished in light tones with round knob handles.
description_view_0: Side view showing the solid exterior wall and partial visibility of the cabinetry's depth and enclosed structure.
description_view_1: Frontal view displaying the full cabinetry layout, including the island, drawers, doors, wall cabinets, and open shelving.
description_view_2: Angled side view highlighting the island's position relative to the cabinetry and the depth of the wall enclosure.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain exterior wall with minimal cabinetry detail visible.
attribute_door_configuration: combination of single door, double door, drawers, and open shelf
